[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a large pink and white cartoon-like face close-up with an inset video thumbnail of a person in the lower right.

The main visual focus is the cartoon-like face, filling most of the frame, with a rounded white area in the center and pink triangular shapes near the top and sides. The face has closed, curved black eyes and a small, simple mouth, with a single horizontal band of darker shading near the bottom. In the lower right corner, there is a rectangular inset image showing a person seated and facing the camera, with their head and shoulders visible.

The setting for the cartoon is unclear because it appears cropped very tightly. The inset person appears indoors, but the background details are unclear due to the small thumbnail size.

Colors and lighting: the cartoon is dominated by soft pink and muted white/gray tones, with smooth, flat shading. The inset thumbnail has dim, indoor lighting, and the person’s clothing appears dark with a lighter area near the upper chest.

No important visible text detected.

This image combines a close-up of a pink cartoon-like face with a small inset video thumbnail of a person looking toward the camera. The cartoon occupies most of the frame while the inset sits in the lower right corner.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
